description: Minecraft modification that lets you toggle various layers on your player
name: No Arrows In You - NAIY

categories.name: Dependencies
categories.content: My mod requires you to have installed fabric api and modmenu for any configuration.

categories.name: About
categories.content: Using few mixins there will no longer be arrows or any other toggleable features rendered. For fun I have also included player resizing, because why not.

categories.name: Features
categories.content:
- Resize player
- Hide armor
- Hide elytra
- Hide riptide
- Hide held item
- Hide block or item on head
- Hide parrot on shoulder
- Hide player completely
- Hide hands in first person
- And more
